message:
Running command: # Still at 81000/14100. Log is paused - repair may be analyzing larger violations.
# Check if OR process is active.
ps aux | grep "openroad" | grep -v bash | grep -v grep | awk '{print $1, $8, $3, $4, $11}' | head -5
echo "---"
stat -c "log mtime=%y" /tmp/librelane_final.log
